Type Property# willResignActive

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+

```
static var willResignActive: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIApplication.WillResignActiveMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIApplication.WillResignActiveMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/willresignactive-4rf2p#see-also)
